steps.name: Returning user signs in with email and password
steps.criteria: Given a returning user with valid credentials, when they enter email and password and tap Sign In, then they are authenticated successfully.
steps.scenario_name: signs in Maria with email and password, resulting in successful auth

steps.name: New user signs up with email and password
steps.criteria: Given a new user, when they enter email and password and tap Sign Up, then their account is created and they are authenticated.
steps.scenario_name: signs up Ana with email and password, resulting in account creation

steps.name: Login screen displays password fields, not email-link
steps.criteria: When the login screen renders, then it shows an email field, a password field, and a Sign In button. No 'Send Sign-In Link' button is present.
steps.scenario_name: shows email field, password field, and Sign In button

steps.name: New user creates account successfully
steps.criteria: Given a new user in Sign Up mode, when they submit valid email and password, then their account is created and they are authenticated.
steps.scenario_name: creates account for Ana and authenticates her

steps.name: Switch from Sign In to Sign Up mode
steps.criteria: Given the login screen in Sign In mode, when the user taps the mode toggle, then the submit button label changes to 'Sign Up'.
steps.scenario_name: changes submit button to "Sign Up" after tapping toggle

steps.name: Switch from Sign Up to Sign In mode
steps.criteria: Given the login screen in Sign Up mode, when the user taps the mode toggle, then the submit button label changes to 'Sign In'.
steps.scenario_name: changes submit button to "Sign In" after tapping toggle

steps.name: Email persists across mode switches
steps.criteria: Given the user has entered an email address, when they switch between Sign In and Sign Up modes, then the email value is retained in the input field.
steps.scenario_name: retains email value after switching from Sign In to Sign Up

steps.name: Error clears when switching modes
steps.criteria: Given an error message is displayed, when the user switches modes via the toggle, then the error message is cleared.
steps.scenario_name: clears error message after mode toggle

steps.name: Loading indicator during sign-up
steps.criteria: When the user submits a sign-up request, then a loading indicator is shown and the submit button is disabled until the request completes.
steps.scenario_name: shows loading state and disables button during sign-up

steps.name: Wrong password error
steps.criteria: Given a user enters a wrong password for an existing account, when they tap Sign In, then a wrong password error is displayed and they remain on the login screen.
steps.scenario_name: displays wrong password error and stays on login screen

steps.name: Non-existent account suggests signing up
steps.criteria: Given a user enters an email that has no account, when they tap Sign In, then an error is displayed suggesting they sign up instead.
steps.scenario_name: displays non-existent account error with sign-up suggestion

steps.name: Weak password rejected
steps.criteria: Given a user enters a password shorter than the minimum length, when they tap Sign Up, then a minimum password length error is displayed.
steps.scenario_name: displays minimum password length error

steps.name: Existing email rejected on sign-up
steps.criteria: Given a user enters an email that already has an account, when they tap Sign Up, then an error is displayed suggesting they sign in instead.
steps.scenario_name: displays existing account error with sign-in suggestion

steps.name: Empty email validation on sign-in
steps.criteria: Given the email field is empty, when the user taps Sign In, then an empty email error is shown and the auth service is not called.
steps.scenario_name: shows empty email error without calling auth service

steps.name: Empty email validation on sign-up
steps.criteria: Given the email field is empty in Sign Up mode, when the user taps Sign Up, then an empty email error is shown.
steps.scenario_name: shows empty email error in sign-up mode

steps.name: Invalid email format validation
steps.criteria: Given the user enters an improperly formatted email, when they submit, then an email format error is displayed.
steps.scenario_name: shows email format error for invalid email

steps.name: Sign In button disabled during auth
steps.criteria: When an auth request is in progress, then the Sign In button is disabled until the request completes.
steps.scenario_name: disables Sign In button during auth request

steps.name: No email-link UI on login screen
steps.criteria: When the login screen renders, then no email-link UI elements (Send Sign-In Link, check your email, etc.) are present.
steps.scenario_name: does not show any email-link UI elements

steps.name: useAuth exposes password auth methods
steps.criteria: The useAuth hook exposes signIn, signUp, and signOut functions but does not expose sendSignInLink or handleSignInLink.
steps.scenario_name: exposes signIn, signUp, signOut but not email-link methods

steps.name: App does not handle auth deep links
steps.criteria: The app does not register deep link handlers for auth email links. Legacy LoginScreen component files are removed.
steps.scenario_name: app does not register deep link handlers for auth
